MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED and STACY GRANT's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
